phases.name: Quick Wins
phases.goal: Deliver high-value features with minimal complexity

features.name: Email/SMS Alert System
features.user_value: Immediate notification of critical issues prevents prolonged downtime and enables faster response
features.business_impact: Reduces MTTR by 60-80% through proactive alerting

features.name: Camera Grouping & Hierarchical Organization
features.user_value: Easier management of large camera deployments, better dashboard organization
features.business_impact: Reduces configuration time by 70% for large deployments
risks: Performance issues with large group trees

features.name: Enhanced Mobile-Responsive UI
features.user_value: Monitor cameras from smartphones and tablets, enabling on-the-go incident response
features.business_impact: Expands user base by 40% through mobile access
success_metrics: Usable on devices down to 320px width
PWA installable on iOS and Android
risks: Chart libraries may not be mobile-optimized
Complex tables difficult on small screens

phases.name: Core Features
phases.goal: Significantly enhance monitoring capabilities and scalability

features.name: VAPIX Integration & Advanced Monitoring
features.user_value: Deep camera diagnostics beyond simple ping - detect video loss, storage issues, tampering
features.business_impact: Identifies 85% more issues than ping-only monitoring
risks: VAPIX API varies across camera models
Older cameras may lack VAPIX support

features.name: Automated Incident Response & Remediation
features.user_value: Reduce manual intervention for common issues, faster resolution times
features.business_impact: Automates 50% of common incident responses, reducing MTTR by 40%
success_metrics: Execute actions within 10 seconds of trigger
Audit log for all automated actions
risks: Automated actions could cause harm if misconfigured
Infinite loops if action triggers itself

features.name: Advanced Analytics & Trend Prediction
features.user_value: Predict failures before they occur, identify recurring issues
features.business_impact: Prevents 30% of outages through predictive maintenance
risks: ML models require significant training data
Predictions may be inaccurate for new cameras

features.name: Multi-Tenant & Multi-Site Support
features.user_value: Enables MSPs and large enterprises to manage cameras across multiple locations
features.business_impact: Opens market to MSPs and enterprises (10x revenue potential)
success_metrics: Role changes take effect within 5 seconds

features.name: Video Quality Monitoring & Recording Validation
features.user_value: Ensure recorded footage is usable for evidence, detect quality degradation
success_metrics: Quality analysis completes in < 10 seconds per camera
risks: Video analysis CPU and bandwidth intensive
Continuous stream analysis may impact network

features.name: Integration Hub (SIEM, Ticketing, Webhook)
features.user_value: Seamlessly integrate camera monitoring into existing IT workflows
features.business_impact: Increases adoption by 60% in enterprise environments
success_metrics: Custom webhooks support any HTTP endpoint

features.name: Mobile Native Apps (iOS & Android)
features.user_value: Full-featured mobile experience with push notifications and offline mode
success_metrics: Offline mode supports 24 hours of data

features.name: Compliance & Audit Reporting (GDPR, HIPAA, SOX)
features.user_value: Simplify compliance audits and ensure regulatory requirements are met
features.business_impact: Enables sales to regulated industries (healthcare, finance)
success_metrics: Audit log captures 100% of system actions
risks: Audit log storage can grow very large

risk_mitigation.technical_debt: Allocate 20% of development time for refactoring
risk_mitigation.user_adoption: Beta testing with 10-20 pilot users per feature
